title: ジャパンカップの後に・ここから！

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I... lost. The world's hella strongest was too far
ahead for me to catch up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My body is on fire right now! The race just ended,
yet I feel like I could run another right this
moment!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't forgive myself for being so weak. And I'm
really frustrated that I lost, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: This is only the beginning. I know it! I will get stronger!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! I'll be counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way back home...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Great job at the Japan Cup, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass! Did you see me race?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! I was watching intently from the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for you here ever since then.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waiting for me? But why? Wait, you don't mean...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Your battle with El was impressive. In fact, it was
quite moving.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No one can doubt how strong you've become
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: And thus, I would like to challenge you as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
As a kindred spirit who shares the goal of making
it to the end of the journey we call a "race."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Grass!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Our fated battle shall take place at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The race where only the most resilient classic and
senior year Umamusume with enough votes get to
participate.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let us determine who will reign supreme, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like that, Special Week finds herself a rival
to race against in the Arima Kinen—the Beast,
Grass Wonder.
